results.title: WizeMe.APP | Private AI Continuity and Decision OS
results.content:
Private continuity for people carrying too much context

# Stop losing the thread. WizeMe remembers what matters so you move.

One private partner turns scattered apps, meetings, notes, relationships, and open loops into clearer decisions and follow-through.

Scattered  meetings decisions people routines  become remembered next moves.

Start free with one thread Read common questions See plans

Trusted by privacy-minded operators 146 reviews across rendered routes 0 private memories exposed 0 blocking route issues Launch pricing available Memory-aware decisions

Start here

## Bring one real thing.

A decision, meeting, relationship, habit, or open loop. WizeMe turns it into a cleaner next move before asking you to learn the product. [...] ## Stop making every app, meeting, note, and open loop compete for your attention.

Most productivity tools store fragments. WizeMe is designed to turn those fragments into remembered decisions, next moves, relationship context, routines, and useful briefs. The point is not another dashboard. The point is a private partner that helps you carry context forward without making your work or life feel managed by a machine.

## How WizeMe helps

### 1. Bring one real thing

Start with a decision, goal, person, meeting, habit, health signal, note, or pressure point. WizeMe uses a guided first session when you are new and a direct app path when you are returning.

### 2. Build continuity [...] ### 2. Build continuity

Your partner can remember decisions, constraints, corrections, people, and outcomes with permission, then use that context to make the next conversation sharper.

### 3. Follow through

Morning briefs, nightly debriefs, hard-talk prep, meeting prep, Board of 10, reminders, and routines turn insight into action instead of another open loop.

## Built for people whose context is already too valuable to keep scattered.

Founders, operators, professionals, creators, students, caregivers, and ambitious people can use WizeMe to connect work, family, health, goals, notes, relationships, and decisions. It is not a replacement for human judgment. It is a continuity layer that helps you notice what matters sooner and act with less re-explaining.

results.title: Communicate with Someone Who Shuts Down
results.content:
1. Sam, thanks for sharing. Based on what you’ve said, I think you might be right. I know that it is so frustrating when you try and try, and it’s like banging your fists against a closed door. In my experience there’s probably a lot on the other side of that door that might feel overwhelming to your partner, and they are likely just as confused and frustrated as you are. [...] 99. The pursuer. I try and try and try and no response. On the rare occasion I do get one, it’s to appease my feelings. Only twice did I get real, raw emotion. Enough to validate my concerns at the time, but not enough to heal what we’re going through. I know with no intervention, our relationship will not last…
100. Sam, thanks for sharing. Based on what you’ve said, I think you might be right. I know that it is so frustrating when you try and try, and it’s like banging your fists against a closed door. In my experience there’s probably a lot on the other side of that door that might feel overwhelming to your partner, and they are likely just as confused and frustrated as you are. [...] I have tried everything. At this point, as petty as it sounds, I feel like shutting down. My feelings/needs/wants aren’t heard or validated, so why should I keep sharing them? I am just exhausted and frustrated emotionally and mentally. Any input is welcome. We aren’t in a bad place just frustrating.

results.title: What do you do when you can't rely on your spouse?
results.content:
for IT. I chose to work from home when I gave birth to our first son. I'm expected to do literally everything. I don't just go to work outside the office where I can focus and get stuff done - I work from home where I take care of the baby, our son (when he's not in school), family stuff (doctor's appointments, insurance stuff, bills, etc.), and sit amongst the mess that is our home. It's beyond frustrating, because I feel like my life would be EASIER if it was just me and our sons. I hate that feeling. I wouldn't necessarily be happier, but my life would be easier. It's beyond frustrating when you ARE married and you DO have a "partner", yet you still do everything yourself. For example, today my H called in sick from work. He's mildly sick - I know he just wanted to finally use a [...] So the problem exists and yet the question remains. How do you get someone to see just this much and believe it even if you they can't see it themselves and never will the same as you....yet, there is no way to prove it. You can't prove a negative and that is extremely frustrating on both sides of this issue.

J



Your partner's idea that it's okay to storm, curse, throw and slam things is way off base. There is a bottom line to being a good partner...and what he asks you to adjust to doesn't pass the test. It's his responsibility to be a 'good enough' partner.

If either of you is interested in more on treatment, go to my online treatment guide...he really can do better.

 desperate ADHD partner

))



 and left my sink a total mess, leaving all his stuff on my sink. [...] It gets really frustrating. I feel like I am a mom to a 7 year old and a 26 year old and this is not the life I had envisioned for myself. I know plans change, I know things aren't always going to work out the way you want, but I didn't think by marrying my husband I'd be stuck having to take care of him like a mother. Or that I would have to step in and be the only adult in our household. I planned our entire vacation for our anniversary and didn't get to relax even once while there because he was always crabby and didn't want to make any decisions, nothing. Not what to eat, what to do, nothing. It was up to me to come up with all of our meals and activities and it's just not what I wanted with my life.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Quick answers to common questions to help you better understand the product, features, and services.

### What other apps does Wizer.Me integrate with?

Wizer.Me integrates various platforms and software, such as Google Classroom and Google Drive.

### Who are the typical users of Wizer.Me?

The typical users are education professionals, K-12 schools, vocational training, and higher education.

### Does Wizer.Me offer an API?

No, Wizer.Me does not offer an API.

### What language does Wizer.Me support?

Wizer.Me software primarily supports the English language. [...] See How It Works

Worksheet Content Personalization

Teachers can create individual worksheets for students with unlimited alternative questions, promoting the powerful concept of student choice. This level of customization allows for grouping based on diverse learning styles, ensuring each student receives a learning experience tailored specifically to their needs.

See How It Works

## Pros And Cons of Wizer.Me

A quick look at Wizer.Me's strengths and weaknesses to  
 help you decide if it's the right fit

#### Pros

 Easy to use and highly versatile
 Reduces time spent on grading
 Supports diverse multimedia integration

#### Cons

 Support gaps can slow down problem resolution
 Integration often requires third‑party API connections
